slides.title: The edge: privileged actors leave public trails — SmartFlow captures them systematically

bullets: Insiders know their company — Form 4 must be filed within 2 business days of trade
Congress members trade on policy knowledge — STOCK Act forces disclosure within 45 days
Institutional 13F reveals what $100M+ funds actually hold (not just what they say)
Whale on-chain movements signal accumulation before price moves
Cluster selling (e.g. CHPT: 5 insiders selling simultaneously) = red flag signal
Unified schema — all signals in one table regardless of market or source
Collector pattern — each data source is an isolated, swappable module
SQLite first — no infrastructure overhead, portable, queryable from anywhere
Real-time polling via APScheduler — Form 4 checks every 5 minutes
Dedup by source_id — running twice never creates duplicate records

slides.title: Congress members bought and sold in near-equal proportions — MSFT, AAPL, NVDA dominate their portfolios
Architecture is complete for Phase 1 — 3 further phases planned for full market coverage
Full pipeline spans 5 phases — crypto and HK stocks are the highest-value next steps

slides.title: SmartFlow is queryable today — 5 CLI commands cover the full collection and analysis workflow
bullets: python -m smartflow collect --source sec_form4     → fetch latest insider trades from SEC EDGAR Atom feed
python -m smartflow collect --source congress      → fetch Congress trades from QuiverQuant (free, no auth)
python -m smartflow collect --all                  → run all active collectors in sequence
python -m smartflow query --market US --days 7     → show all US signals from the past 7 days
python -m smartflow query --ticker AAPL            → filter by ticker (cross-source)
python -m smartflow query --direction BUY --min-value 500000  → big insider buys only
python -m smartflow schedule --all                 → start continuous polling (Form 4 every 5 min)
slides.note: DB at data/smartflow.db — queryable directly with any SQLite client. Add SEC_EDGAR_EMAIL to .env before running Form 4 collector.

slides.title: Next: Add crypto whale tracking + HK stock signals
items: Phase 2: Integrate Whale Alert API + Etherscan (need free API keys)
Phase 3: Build HKEX director dealings scraper (highest value for local edge)
Phase 5: Wire Telegram alert bot to fire on cluster buys / large value signals
Stretch: Backtest 'follow congress buys >$50k' strategy against SPY
slides.footer: SmartFlow v0.1 · Python + SQLite + APScheduler · C:\Users\user\SmartFlow
